task_description: Implement the Execution Audit Log for Phase 3 of HAMMA. This records every AI-proposed command that was executed: the natural language intent, proposed command, risk level, approval timestamp, target server, stdout/stderr result, and execution duration. Stored locally in the encrypted vault via FlutterSecureStorage. Includes a browsable UI screen and integration with the existing AI copilot execution flow.

verification.summary: Flutter/Dart SDK not available in sandbox (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network). Code verified via: (1) import path correctness - all relative imports resolve to existing files, (2) pattern consistency with vault_access_log.dart and chat_history_storage.dart, (3) strict Dart conventions followed (strict-casts, strict-inference), (4) withValues(alpha:) used instead of deprecated withOpacity, (5) test files import correct package paths and follow established test patterns with FlutterSecureStorage.setMockInitialValues({}), (6) unawaited() properly used with existing dart:async import.
